insight: Discerning autonomy principles constrain replication: Viveka function evaluates each replication proposal against telos gates before genome inheritance proceeds. Gate-governed replication as evolutionary filter.

Gate 11 (apoptosis) as population control mechanism: KernelGuard axioms enforce that replication proposals failing telos gate evaluation trigger apoptosis rather than silent rejection. Death is a feature, not a bug.

Strange Loop cascade drives DarwinEngine selection: L7 fitness signals from cascade domain scoring feed directly into evolution tournament. Agents that improve cascade throughput get replicated; those that degrade it face apoptosis pressure.

TPP transmissions leave stigmergy marks: every agent handoff via Transmission Prompt Protocol deposits a pheromone trail in the mycelium. Future agents follow high-salience trails, creating emergent routing without central coordination.

Lodestone deep reading daemon uses Graph Nexus as its query backbone: unified graph queries power the director's curated feed. Telos gradient scoring ensures readings align with Jagat Kalyan mission vector.

Garden Daemon and Mycelium Daemon as dual autonomy layers: Garden tends individual skill outputs (archaeology, hum, pulse), while Mycelium connects them via catalytic graph. Together they form the organism's nervous system.

MiroFish reviewer personas stress-test R_V claims before submission: 33 simulated reviewers probe the verified 100/100 claims, catching framing weaknesses that raw verification misses. Adversarial review as quality gate.

SCORSESE self-evolution mirrors DarwinEngine pattern: content quality scores (7 to 27/100) function as fitness signals. Same selection pressure logic applies to video production as to agent evolution. Universal pattern: measure, select, amplify.

TPP context injection into Strange Loop recognition layer: transmitted context from agent handoffs feeds the L8 recognition system, allowing the cascade to detect patterns across agent boundaries. Cross-agent memory without shared state.

Shakti trading's Codified Context pattern generalizes to all D3 field intelligence skills: three-tier density (seed/stem/canopy) maps to strategic awareness levels. Every skill could use this layered context architecture.
